<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Yasaka-jinja (Gika, Koka)]][[ja:八坂神社 (甲賀市)]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|八坂神社 (甲賀市)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Yasaka Shrine (Q72183108)
| native_name = 八坂神社
| image = Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 09.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Yasaka Shrine (Q72183108)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.95059027777778|136.19681583333335}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Gozu Tennō|lt=Gozu Tennō|de|Gozu-Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|it|Gozu Tennō|ja|牛頭天王|zh|牛頭天王|WD=Q11570247}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Yasaka Shrine'''|八坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181801</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181801</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1260
* {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|WD=Q11071125}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181801</ref>
* {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|ko|정5위|zh|正五位|WD=Q11123280}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181801</ref>

* {{ill|Gion shrines|lt=Gion shrine|en|Gion shrines|ja|祇園神社|WD=Q11588442}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11638477}}
** Series ordinal: 21
** P155: {{ill|Ihimichino Shrine|lt=Ihimichino Shrine|WD=Q135039797}}
** P156: {{ill|Mikami Shrine|lt=Mikami Shrine|en|Mikami Shrine|ja|御上神社|WD=Q11488762}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Kōka, Shiga|lt=Koka|ar|كوكا (شيغا)|azb|کوکا، شیقا|ceb|Kōka-shi|ce|Кока (гӀала)|de|Kōka|en|Kōka, Shiga|envoyage|Koka|es|Kōka (Shiga)|fa|کوکا، شیگا|fi|Kōka|fr|Kōka (Shiga)|gl|Kōka, Shiga|hy|Կոկա (քաղաք)|id|Kōka, Shiga|it|Kōka|ja|甲賀市|javoyage|甲賀市|ko|고카시|mzn|کوکا، شیگا|nl|Koka (Shiga)|pl|Kōka|pt|Kōka (Shiga)|ro|Kōka|ru|Кока (город)|sv|Kōka, Shiga|tg|Кока|th|โคกะ (จังหวัดชิงะ)|tl|Kōka, Shiga|tr|Kōka, Shiga|tt|Кока (шәһәр)|uk|Кока (Сіґа)|ur|کوکا، شیگا|vi|Kōka, Shiga|war|Kōka, Shiga|zh_classical|甲賀市|zh_min_nan|Kôka-chhī|zh_yue|甲賀|zh|甲賀市|WD=Q847584}}
* {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|WD=Q843882}}
* {{ill|Kōka District, Shiga|lt=Kōka district|en|Kōka District, Shiga|fa|بخش کوکا، شیگا|ja|甲賀郡|ru|Кока (уезд)|tr|Kōka İlçesi, Shiga|zh|甲賀郡|WD=Q4227244}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.95059027777778|136.19681583333335}}

== image (P18) ==

* Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 09.jpg

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Gozu Tennō|lt=Gozu Tennō|de|Gozu-Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|it|Gozu Tennō|ja|牛頭天王|zh|牛頭天王|WD=Q11570247}}
* {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|ar|سوسانو|azb|سوسانو|bcl|Susanoo|be|Сусанаа|bg|Сусаноо|ca|Susanoo|cs|Susanoo|da|Susa-no-o|de|Susanoo|el|Σουσάνoο|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|eo|Susanoo|es|Susanoo|eu|Susanoo|fa|سوسانو (خدا)|fi|Susanoo|fr|Susanoo|hr|Susano|hu|Szuszanoo|hy|Սուսանո|id|Susanoo|it|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|ka|სუსანოო-ნო-მიკოტო|ko|스사노오|la|Susano'o|lb|Susanoo|mni|ꯁꯨꯁꯅꯨ-ꯅꯣ-ꯃꯤꯀꯣꯇꯣ|nl|Susanoo|pl|Susanoo|pt|Susanoo|ro|Susanoo|ru|Сусаноо|simple|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|sl|Susanovo|sr|Сусаноо|su|Susanoo|sv|Susanoo|ta|சுசானவோ|th|ซูซาโนโอะ|tr|Susanoo|uk|Сусаноо|vi|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|zh_min_nan|Susanoo|zh|素戔嗚尊|WD=Q272993}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181801
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Japan|lt=Japan|ab|Иапониа|ace|Jeupang|ady|Японие|af|Japan|als|Japan|alt|Јопон|ami|Ripon|am|ጃፓን|ang|Iapan|anp|जापान|an|Chapón|arc|ܝܦܢ|ar|اليابان|arnews|تصنيف:اليابان|arquote|اليابان|ary|الجاپون|arz|اليابان|ast|Xapón|as|জাপান|atj|Japan|avk|Nipona|av|Япония|awa|जापान|ay|Nihun|azb|ژاپون|az|Yaponiya|azquote|Yaponiya|ban|Jepang|bar|Japan|bat_smg|Japuonėjė|ba|Япония|bbc|Japang|bcl|Hapon|bdr|Gipun|be_x_old|Японія|be|Японія|bew|Jepang|bg|Япония|bgnews|Категория:Япония|bh|जापान|bi|Japan|bjn|Japang|blk|ဂျပန်ခမ်းထီ|bm|Japan|bn|জাপান|bnquote|জাপান|bnvoyage|জাপান|bo|ཉི་ཧོང་།|bpy|জাপান|br|Japan|bs|Japan|bsnews|Kategorija:Japan|btm|Jepang|bug|ᨍᨛᨄ|bxr|Япон Улас|ca|Japó|canews|Categoria:Japó|caquote|Japó|cbk_zam|Japón|cdo|Nĭk-buōng|ceb|Hapon|ce|Ипнойчоь|chr|ᏣᏩᏂᏏ|ch|Chapan|chy|Japan|ckb|ژاپۆن|co|Giappone|crh|Japon|csb|Japòńskô|cs|Japonsko|csnews|Kategorie:Japonsko|csquote|Japonsko|csvoyage|Japonsko|cu|Ꙗпѡнїꙗ|cv|Япони|cy|Japan|dag|Japan|da|Japan|de|Japan|denews|Kategorie:Japan|dequote|Japan|devoyage|Japan|din|Japan|diq|Japonya|dsb|Japańska|dtp|Jepun|dty|जापान|dv|ޖަޕާނު|dz|ཇ་པཱན|ee|Japan|el|Ιαπωνία|elnews|Κατηγορία:Ιαπωνία|elquote|Ιαπωνία|elvoyage|Ιαπωνία|eml|Giapòṅ|en|Japan|ennews|Category:Japan|enquote|Japan|envoyage|Japan|eo|Japanio|eonews|Kategorio:Japanujo|eoquote|Japanio|eovoyage|Japanio|es|Japón|esnews|Categoría:Japón|esquote|Japón|esvoyage|Japón|et|Jaapan|etquote|Jaapan|eu|Japonia|ext|Japón|fa|ژاپن|fanews|رده:ژاپن|faquote|ژاپن|favoyage|ژاپن|ff|Japan|fiu_vro|Jaapan|fi|Japani|finews|Luokka:Japani|fivoyage|Japani|fj|Japani|fo|Japan|frp|Japon|frr|Jaapan|fr|Japon|frnews|Catégorie:Japon|frquote|Japon|frvoyage|Japon|fur|Gjapon|fy|Japan|gag|Yaponiya|gan|日本|ga|An tSeapáin|gcr|Japon|gd|An Iapan|glk|ژاپؤن|gl|Xapón|gn|Hapõ|gom|जपान|gor|Japangi|gorquote|Jepang|got|𐌾𐌰𐍀𐌰𐌽|gu|જાપાન|guw|Japan|gv|Yn Çhapaan|hak|Ngi̍t-pún|ha|Japan|haw|Iāpana|he|יפן|henews|תגית:יפן|hequote|יפן|hevoyage|יפן|hif|Japan|hi|जापान|hiquote|जापान|hivoyage|जापान|hr|Japan|hsb|Japanska|ht|Japon|hu|Japán|hunews|Kategória:Japán|hy|Ճապոնիա|hyw|Ճափոն|ia|Japon|iba|Jipun|id|Jepang|idquote|Jepang|idvoyage|Jepang|ie|Japan|igl|Japan|ig|Japan|ik|Nippan|ilo|Hapon|inh|Японехье|io|Japonia|is|Japan|it|Giappone|itnews|Categoria:Giappone|itquote|Giappone|itvoyage|Giappone|iu|ᔭᐹᓐ|jam|Japan|ja|日本|janews|カテゴリ:日本|jaquote|日本|javoyage|日本|jbo|pongu'e|jv|Jepang|kaa|Yaponiya|kab|Yapan|ka|იაპონია|kbd|Япон|kbp|Sapɔŋ|kcg|Ja̱pan|kge|Jopang|kg|Japan|ki|Japan|kk|Жапония|km|ជប៉ុន|knc|Japan|kn|ಜಪಾನ್|koi|Ниппон|ko|일본|konews|분류:일본|koquote|일본|krc|Джапония|ksh|Japan|ks|جاپان|ku|Japon|kv|Япония|kw|Nihon|ky|Жапония|lad|Japon|la|Iaponia|lbe|Япония|lb|Japan|lez|Япония|lfn|Nion|lg|Japan|lij|Giappon|li|Japan|lld|Iapan|lmo|Giapon|ln|Zapɔ́|lo|ປະເທດຍີ່ປຸ່ນ|ltg|Japoneja|lt|Japonija|lv|Japāna|mad|Jeppang|mai|जापान|map_bms|Jepang|mdf|Японмастор|mg|Japàna|mhr|Японий|min|Japang|mi|Nipono|mk|Јапонија|ml|ജപ്പാൻ|mni|ꯖꯄꯥꯟ|mn|Япон|mrj|Япони|mr|जपान|ms|Jepun|msquote|Jepun|mt|Ġappun|mwl|Japon|myv|Япония Мастор|my|ဂျပန်နိုင်ငံ|mzn|جاپون|nap|Giappone|nds_nl|Japan|nds|Japan|ne|जापान|new|जापान|nia|Jepang|nl|Japan|nlnews|Categorie:Japan|nlvoyage|Japan|nn|Japan|nov|Japan|no|Japan|nqo|ߗ߭ߊߔߐ߲߫|nrm|Japon|nr|Japane|nso|Japane|nv|Binááʼádaałtsʼózí Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|WD=Q17}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 1160005002792

== Commons category (P373) ==

* Yasaka-jinja (Gika, Koka)

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Kahakareno Shrine|lt=Kahakareno Shrine|WD=Q135039798}}

== street address (P6375) ==

* {'text': '滋賀県甲賀市水口町嶬峨1606', 'language': 'ja'}
* {'text': '滋賀県甲賀市甲賀町油日', 'language': 'ja'}

==References==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Gion shrine]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]]
{{commons category|Yasaka-jinja (Gika, Koka)}}
[[JA:八坂神社 (甲賀市)]]

{{wikidata link|Q72183108}}

{{translated page|ja|八坂神社 (甲賀市)|version=107296568|comment=Imported full ja history}}
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{神社
 | 名称=八坂神社
 | 画像=[[File:Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 09.jpg|270px]]<br />社殿
 | 所在地={{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|甲賀市|Q847584}}水口町嶬峨1606
 | 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|2.125|N|136|11|48.537|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
 | 祭神={{jalink|素盞鳴命}}、{{jalink|聖武天皇|Q349263}}、{{jalink|神武天皇|Q200188}}
 | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}論社、旧{{jalink|村社}}
 | 創建=（伝）{{jalink|794年|Q30887}}|例祭={{jalink|5月1日|Q2544}}川枯祭
 | 本殿=一間社{{jalink|流造|Q210684}}
 | 神事={{jalink|1月7日|Q2228}}的山のおこない
 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=八坂神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''八坂神社'''（やさかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|甲賀市|Q847584}}水口町嶬峨にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。

== 歴史 ==
社伝によると、郷土開拓の祖神である川枯神を勧請し、{{jalink|794年|Q30887}}（≈{{jalink|天平|Q1199879}}21年）{{jalink|左大臣|Q949008}}{{jalink|橘諸兄|Q3135863}}公（さだいじんたちばなのもろえ）が隣接する{{jalink|千光寺 (甲賀市)|Q72184313|千光寺}}の{{jalink|伽藍|Q3482038}}を造営する際、{{jalink|法 (仏教)|Q9241518|仏法}}擁護のために{{jalink|社殿}}を造営したと伝わる<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|和書|title=神社紹介>八坂神社（ヤサカ）～（嵯峨大宮）|url=http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=556|website=|accessdate=2019-09-30|publisher=滋賀県神社庁}}</ref>。

{{jalink|932年|Q23656}}（{{jalink|承平 (日本)|Q1324874|承平}}2年）、神徳布施の故をもって、儀俄大宮の号を賜り、現在の地に社殿を建立<ref name=":0" />。

本殿は{{jalink|1439年|Q6380}}（{{jalink|永享|Q1193059}}11年）に建立<ref name=":0" />。嶬峨大宮千光寺雑録によると、{{jalink|1587年|Q6744}}（{{jalink|天正|Q1145058}}15年）に本殿は再建されたと記され、様式手法とも一致している。

{{jalink|1721年|Q6913}}（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}6年）、{{jalink|1866年|Q7712}}（{{jalink|慶応|Q776775}}2年）の修理を経て、{{jalink|1959年|Q5302}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}34年）に解体修理が実施された<ref name=":0" />。

{{jalink|平安時代|Q193292}}には川枯神社と呼ばれ、のちの嶬峨大宮（ぎかおおみや）、午頭天王（ごずてんのう）神社、現在は八坂神社と呼ばれている<ref name=":1">{{Cite book|title=甲賀市史 第8巻 甲賀市事典|date=2016年12月12日|year=2016|publisher=甲賀市|page=49}}</ref>。

== 祭神 ==
{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞鳴命}}、{{jalink|聖武天皇|Q349263}}、{{jalink|神武天皇|Q200188}}<ref name=":0" />

== 祭事 ==

* 川枯祭 - {{jalink|5月1日|Q2544}}<ref name=":0" />
** 前日 - 初老の厄男が獅子頭を持つて氏子全戸を廻る
** 当日 - 午前中に祭典、午後からは神輿渡御（元禄模様の衣装を着けた若衆60人が野洲川を渡る）
* 的山のおこない - {{jalink|1月7日|Q2228}}
** 宮座としてその家の長男の息災延命・家運隆昌を祈願するもの等。見学は不可。

== 境内社 ==

* 天神社
* 熊野社
* 川枯社
* 八幡社
* 八坂社

== 文化財 ==

=== 重要文化財（国指定） ===

* 本殿 - 一間社流造、檜皮葺<ref name=":1" />

=== 市指定文化財 ===

* 神像 - 平安時代作<ref name=":1" />
*下馬橋 - 1699年（元禄12年）雨乞い祈願成就のお礼として氏子から奉納されたもの。凝った造りの反橋。

== 境内 ==
<gallery>
ファイル:Torii, Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi.jpg|鳥居
ファイル:Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 03.jpg|石段付近
ファイル:Stone bridge at Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 01.jpg|下馬橋
ファイル:Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 04.jpg|拝殿と本殿
ファイル:Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi 07.jpg|本殿
ファイル:Cryptomeria japonica at Yasaka shrine known as Kawakare shrine in Gika, Minakuchi.jpg|大杉
</gallery>

== 脚注 ==
{{脚注ヘルプ}}
{{Reflist}}
{{commons|Category:Yasaka-jinja (Gika, Koka)}}


==End Japanese==
[[Category:Yasaka Shrine]]
[[Category:近江国の式内社]]
[[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
[[Category:滋賀県の神社]]
[[Category:甲賀市の建築物]]
[[Category:甲賀市の歴史]]
[[Category:甲賀市の重要文化財]]
[[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]]
[[Category:滋賀県内の市町村指定有形文化財]]
